title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Preparations for the Japanese Derby have been
going well, but just before the race, Satono
Diamond notices her shoes are torn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She brought a backup pair, so it isn't a problem,
but all the same, she can feel the power of the
jinx at work to prevent her from achieving her
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if to shake off her anxiety, she confidently
declares that she's going to win.
